task_completion.description: A visible annotation is added to the loaded medical CT image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Weasis image viewer displays an overlay, drawing, arrow, text, or measurement marking a region of interest on the CT scan.

task_completion.description: The export dialog in Weasis is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for exporting or saving the image is visible over the Weasis interface (e.g., accessed via File > Export).

task_completion.description: The export format is configured to create a DICOM Secondary Capture of the current view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The export settings explicitly show 'DICOM' and options related to 'Secondary Capture', 'Capture current view', or 'View' selected, rather than standard image formats (JPEG/PNG) or bulk original DICOM export.

task_completion.description: The export destination path is set to the requested location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path input field in the export dialog shows '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/surgical_plan.dcm' or the directory is set to 'exports' with the filename 'surgical_plan.dcm'.

task_completion.description: The export action is executed to save the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Export', 'Save', or 'OK' button in the export dialog, or a progress bar/success message indicating the export is complete is visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the Weasis GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks and interactions with Weasis menus, toolbars, and dialogs, rather than terminal commands using external DICOM tools.

integrity.description: The annotation was created using Weasis built-in tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Weasis annotation tools (e.g., measurement, arrow, or drawing tools in the toolbar) are selected and actively used, rather than the image being edited in an external paint program.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely exported the file via the application rather than creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Weasis export dialog is filled out and submitted. There should be no terminal window showing commands like 'touch ~/DICOM/exports/surgical_plan.dcm' or 'cp'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected export path is exactly '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/surgical_plan.dcm'. The task requires a DICOM Secondary Capture (SOP Class UID: 1.2.840.10008.5.1.4.1.1.7). In the Weasis GUI, this means the agent must choose to export the 'current view' or 'capture' to DICOM format, rather than exporting as a standard image (like JPEG) or simply copying the original raw DICOM files.
